kurti.title: Classic Cotton A-Line Kurti with Floral Prints
bullets: Made from 100% premium soft cotton fabric for all-day comfort and breathability.
Elegant floral pattern with traditional prints, suitable for casual and office wear.
Features a refined round neck, three-quarter sleeves, and A-line silhouette.
Easy home wash; colors are guaranteed fast and fade-resistant.
Perfect pairing with leggings, palazzos, or jeans for a complete look.

size_chart.S: Bust: 36 in, Waist: 32 in, Length: 44 in
size_chart.M: Bust: 38 in, Waist: 34 in, Length: 44 in

size_chart.XXL: Bust: 44 in, Waist: 40 in, Length: 45 in

saree.title: Elegant Banarasi Art Silk Saree with Woven Zari Border
bullets: Crafted from high-quality art silk fabric providing a luxurious drape and elegant sheen.
Features an intricate golden woven zari design across the body and heavy designer pallu.
Comes with an unstitched blouse piece matching the saree's border work.
Saree Length: 5.5 meters, Blouse Length: 0.8 meters.
Dry clean recommended to maintain texture, color vibrancy, and zari threadwork.

footwear.title: Comfort Walk Women's Cushioned Flat Sandals
bullets: Padded footbed offers superior cushioning and arch support for active walking.
Made of premium synthetic leather upper that is skin-friendly and durable.
Anti-slip TPR rubber outsole ensures stable grip on wet and dry surfaces.
Slip-on style with elastic strap for a secure and customized fit.
Ideal for daily commutes, casual outings, and pairing with ethnic or western outfits.

jewelry.title: Traditional Gold-Plated Kundan Necklace Set with Earrings
bullets: Exquisite kundan work accented with artificial gemstones and pearl drops.
Gold-plated alloy metal base crafted with classic Indian heritage motifs.
Necklace features an adjustable thread/drawstring closure for a perfect neck fit.
Matching pair of dangling drop earrings included with secure push-back clasps.
Avoid direct contact with perfumes, water, and spray to maintain plating shine.

home_decor.title: Handcrafted Ceramic Flower Vase for Living Room Decor
bullets: Handmade by Indian artisans using high-temperature fired clay for longevity.
Features a modern minimalist design with a neutral matte textured finish.
Perfect size for holding fresh blooms, dried pampas grass, or artificial flowers.
Heavy and stable base prevents tipping on tables, shelves, or countertops.
Gently wipe with a damp cloth to clean; do not use abrasive sponges.

size_chart.Standard: Height: 10 in, Width: 4.5 in, Base Diameter: 3.5 in, Weight: 850 grams
